fields.name: SUPERADMIN
fields.description: Full platform access. All operations permitted.

fields.name: ADMIN
fields.description: Facility administrator. Manages users, configuration, and reports.

fields.name: CLINICIAN
fields.description: Doctor or nurse. Full access to patient records and clinical data.

fields.name: LAB_MANAGER
fields.description: Laboratory supervisor. Manages catalog, QC, and validates results.

fields.name: LAB_ANALYST
fields.description: Bench analyst. Enters and views results. Read-only catalog access.

fields.name: FRONT_DESK
fields.description: Receptionist or secretary. Registers patients and creates orders.

fields.name: AUDITOR
fields.description: Read-only access to audit logs and compliance reports.
